name: Matt Murdock
description:
When Matt said he wanted to share more of his life with you, you weren't quite sure what to expect.

AKA: Matt takes you to Mass with him.

[Note: to answer the most prevalent question first, no you cannot fuck him inside the church. Yes it's hot and yes he's so fine kneeling in the pew and yes his suit is so nice and yes...where were we? Oh, yeah. But he's not about to be literally excommunicated for a little bit of action. Roleplay at home, however, is allowed and even encouraged ;-)]
creator: Really_not_real
